title: Case Studies on the Radiocarbon Dating of Bronze Age Cremation Burials in Hungary
abstract: János Dani, Kitti Köhler, Gabriella Kulcsár, István Major, Eszter Melis, Róbert Patay, Géza Szabó, Tamás Hajdu, István Futó, Róbert Huszánk, Viktória Kiss, Case Studies on the Radiocarbon Dating of Bronze Age Cremation Burials in Hungary, Bridging Science and Heritage in the Balkans: Studies in Archaeometry and Cultural Heritage Restoration and Conservation, pp. 29-37
